title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal School Board Resolution No. 2022-16 Dated December 28, 2022 Entitled "resolution Appropriating the Amount of Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 500,000.00) Chargeable Against the 2021 Special Education Fund Savings As Supplemental Budget No. 11 to Augment Electricity Expenses and Further Approving the Same." Councilwoman Leren Mae M. Bautista 01/16/2023
